title: GTA+
headline: GTA+
subtitle: This Month’s Benefits
content:
In addition to the recurring monthly GTA$500,000 deposited directly into your Maze Bank account, GTA+ Members who've signed up for this month (March 5 - April 1) will also receive:

— The Vapid Firebolt ASP (Off-Road)
— 50% off Salvage Yard Properties and their Upgrades and Modifications
— 2X GTA$ on Salvage Yard Daily Income
— The Broker Prolaps Basketball Top and Shorts
— And more

Membership automatically renews monthly, cancel anytime. Visit rsg.ms/gtaplus for more info.
